description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, situated on a rectangular lot surrounded by a low fence. The front features a paved driveway lined with flowering trees and leads to a garage and main entrance. The rear of the property includes a spacious backyard with green lawn, a small pool, a children's play structure, and an outdoor seating area under a pergola. The house exterior is clad in light-colored brick and large windows, providing ample natural light. The landscaping is minimal but well-maintained, with a mix of hardscape and softscape elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and contemporary architectural details.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, brick exterior, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a driveway, garage, pool, and play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and flowering trees along the front yard.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a lawn, pool, play structure, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the backyard amenities, rear facade, and access to outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the house, fenced yard, and landscaping with a prominent tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, paved steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by flowering trees and a driveway.
